name: CanadaBis Capital Inc.
summary: CanadaBis Capital Inc. cultivates, produces, distributes, and sells cannabis and cannabis products in Canada. The company operates through three segments: wholesale, retail, and extraction and tolling. It also engages in the sale of cannabis and cannabis related products to end consumers, as well as provides cannabinoid extraction services to other licensed producers. The company is headquartered in Red Deer County, Canada.
